title: This AI trading bot made $400 the first day of having the account.
author: Mediocre_Toe1489

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: So, the bot is from a private developer that I have a connection with. I also have a connection with the owner of the prop firm Paradise Capital. We purchased one of their funded accounts and connected the AI to trade with it. It's been performing really well.

comments.author: DingleBaerry
comments.body:
😂 With $600,000, you made $400 in a day and you’re happy with those results?

You could have thrown that into almost any stock today, and made a few grand. 

This sub is filled with so much spam.

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: That was only the first day, it made $3,700 the other day

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: Cause it was the first day and it didn’t even get to trade the entire day. I’ve posted others as well showing greater profits.

replies.author: DingleBaerry
replies.body: Alright. Send me the code for this platform. I’ll throw something into it and see what happens.

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: Sure I can get you set up with the bot if you’re interested. I also forgot to mention that the 600k account is funded it wasn’t my money I’m trading through a prop firm. The funded account only cost $3,500 plus the cost of the AI.

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: +1-(916) 472-1260 here’s the number to the advisor of the AI.

replies.author: DingleBaerry
replies.body: Oh, you’re running a scam. Interesting.
